13683827207.detail_text: About the product: Product name: Rapid cooling agent Net content: 260ml 360ML Efficacy: Rapid cooling Main ingredients: flavor, propellant, cooling factor Scope of application: seat backs, steering wheels, skin and other surfaces that need to be cooled Warning! 1. After spraying, do not approach open flames (smoking, lighters, etc.); 2. This product is flammable and is prohibited from direct spraying. It is strictly forbidden to approach open flames. (For example, ignite with a lighter.) 3. It is not recommended to put it in the car. Depending on the situation in the car, the temperature in some cars is too high and it will be unsafe; 4. When using it in the car, do not spray directly on the car window glass to avoid damaging the glass; 5. If the product is sprayed on the human body, please keep a distance of more than 30CM, and do not spray on the same part for a long time to avoid frostbite; 6. Please keep the nozzle unobstructed after use, please wipe it clean to avoid nozzle clogging; 7. It should be stored in a place where children cannot reach. Precautions: ① When used on the human body, keep a proper distance and move the spray; ② When used in the car, do not spray directly on the glass; How to use Please strictly follow the product instructions, store in a cool and ventilated place, seal and store, and not easily accessible to children. When using, please stay away from fire, direct sunlight and violent collision. Product features: Quick cooling: high-tech formula, instantly release high-energy cooling effect. High-pressure fine atomization nozzle: ensure that each spray is delicate and even, and the cool feeling is longer-lasting. Small and portable: lightweight design allows you to enjoy coolness anytime, anywhere. Suitable for both indoors and outdoors: whether it is at home, in the office or outdoor travel, it is your good partner for cooling down. When to use: Does the car heat up quickly while driving? Feel uncomfortable in the hot sun during outdoor activities? Sweating profusely after exercise, want a moment of coolness? Cooling spray, instantly cools you down.
13683827207.detail_html:
About the product:

Product name: Rapid cooling agent

Net content: 260ml 360ML

Efficacy: Rapid cooling

Main ingredients: flavor, propellant, cooling factor

Scope of application: seat backs, steering wheels, skin and other surfaces that need to be cooled

Warning!

1. After spraying, do not approach open flames (smoking, lighters, etc.);

2. This product is flammable and is prohibited from direct spraying. It is strictly forbidden to approach open flames. (For example, ignite with a lighter.)

3. It is not recommended to put it in the car. Depending on the situation in the car, the temperature in some cars is too high and it will be unsafe;

4. When using it in the car, do not spray directly on the car window glass to avoid damaging the glass;

5. If the product is sprayed on the human body, please keep a distance of more than 30CM, and do not spray on the same part for a long time to avoid frostbite;

6. Please keep the nozzle unobstructed after use, please wipe it clean to avoid nozzle clogging;

7. It should be stored in a place where children cannot reach.

Precautions:

① When used on the human body, keep a proper distance and move the spray;

② When used in the car, do not spray directly on the glass;

How to use

Please strictly follow the product instructions, store in a cool and ventilated place, seal and store,

and not easily accessible to children. When using, please stay away from fire, direct sunlight and violent collision.

Product features:

Quick cooling: high-tech formula, instantly release high-energy cooling effect.

High-pressure fine atomization nozzle: ensure that each spray is delicate and even, and the cool feeling is longer-lasting.

Small and portable: lightweight design allows you to enjoy coolness anytime, anywhere.

Suitable for both indoors and outdoors: whether it is at home, in the office or outdoor travel, it is your good partner for cooling down.

When to use:

Does the car heat up quickly while driving?

Feel uncomfortable in the hot sun during outdoor activities?

Sweating profusely after exercise, want a moment of coolness?

Cooling spray, instantly cools you down.

About the product:

Product name: Rapid cooling agent

Net content: 260ml 360ML

Efficacy: Rapid cooling

Main ingredients: flavor, propellant, cooling factor

Scope of application: seat backs, steering wheels, skin and other surfaces that need to be cooled

Warning!

1. After spraying, do not approach open flames (smoking, lighters, etc.);

2. This product is flammable and is prohibited from direct spraying. It is strictly forbidden to approach open flames. (For example, ignite with a lighter.)

3. It is not recommended to put it in the car. Depending on the situation in the car, the temperature in some cars is too high and it will be unsafe;

4. When using it in the car, do not spray directly on the car window glass to avoid damaging the glass;

5. If the product is sprayed on the human body, please keep a distance of more than 30CM, and do not spray on the same part for a long time to avoid frostbite;

6. Please keep the nozzle unobstructed after use, please wipe it clean to avoid nozzle clogging;

7. It should be stored in a place where children cannot reach.

Precautions:

① When used on the human body, keep a proper distance and move the spray;

② When used in the car, do not spray directly on the glass;

How to use

Please strictly follow the product instructions, store in a cool and ventilated place, seal and store,

and not easily accessible to children. When using, please stay away from fire, direct sunlight and violent collision.

Product features:

Quick cooling: high-tech formula, instantly release high-energy cooling effect.

High-pressure fine atomization nozzle: ensure that each spray is delicate and even, and the cool feeling is longer-lasting.

Small and portable: lightweight design allows you to enjoy coolness anytime, anywhere.

Suitable for both indoors and outdoors: whether it is at home, in the office or outdoor travel, it is your good partner for cooling down.

When to use:

Does the car heat up quickly while driving?

Feel uncomfortable in the hot sun during outdoor activities?

Sweating profusely after exercise, want a moment of coolness?

Cooling spray, instantly cools you down.

3310877274.detail_text: MOTUL MoCool Coolants and Antifreezes 500ml Any cooling system of bikes, cars, ATVs… when overheating is observed or in racing conditions to decrease engine operating temperature. MOTUL INJECTOR CLEANER DIESEL provides a perfect lubrication during cleaning phase and prevents removed micro-particles from depositing. Moreover, it prevents from Diesel fuel oxidation and microorganisms formation. PERFORMANCE: ASRA Approved (American Sport Bike Racing Association), WERA Approved - Motorcycle Road Racing Engines run cooler by 15°C (30°F) : Improves thermal exchange and engine cooling system efficiency. Cooling system optimal protection against corrosion. Recommended for magnesium, aluminium alloys cases, cast iron, copper, brass and bronze systems. Water pump protection, avoids cavitation. Anti-corrosion properties that remain while high temperature and ageing. Low corrosion inhibitors consumption. Seals, rubber pipes, and plastics parts friendly. RECOMMENDATIONS: MOTUL MoCool is a concentrated cooling fluid that may be mixed with distillated water for immediate use as a coolant. Mix with water at 5% (20:1). Do not use pure product. Can be mixed with most coolants monoethyleneglycol based. ATTENTION : - Some racing regulation do not allow anything else than pure water, if any doubt, check with race official organisation before using MoCool. Motul Company cannot be involved in case of race disqualification while using MoCool inappropriately. - MoCool does not provide any antifreeze protection.

It uses the latest and advanced PSi-OAT (Phosphate and Silicate Organic Acid Technology) based inhibitor system which is ideal for modern “downsized”, high power density, hotter running engines used in the latest generation of passenger cars as well as in many other engines. The extended long-life inhibitor formulation prevents rust, corrosion, cavitation and degradation of the cooling system for 8 years or 500,000km. It is available in both concentrate and premix formulations. APPLICATION Purple OEM Coolant is suitable for the cooling systems of petrol, LPG, light and heavy-duty diesel and industrial engines where anti-freeze / anti-boil and anti-corrosion properties are required. It is suitable for passenger cars, 4WD’s, motorcycles, light & heavy-duty commercial vehicles, construction and agricultural equipment. It is suitable for use with Australian, European, Asian & US vehicles. Purple OEM Coolant is Approved for use in VAG (Volkswagen Automotive Group) vehicles such as Volkswagen, Audi, Skoda, Bentley, Lamborghini, Bugatti, Porsche, SEAT where the new TL 774-L/G12evo specifications are required. It may also be used as a replacement where TL 744-J (G13) was previously specified, provided a full system service is completed. The advanced formulation is ideal for use in vehicles such as Toyota, Hyundai, Mitsubishi, Kia and other Asian manufacturers that require P-OAT based coolants. It can replace green coolants using P-OAT or PSi-OAT technology (after appropriate flushing). It is suitable for use in and out of warranty service to maintain OEM performance. Perskindol Active Muscle & Joints Cooling–Warming Relief

Perskindol Muscle and joint Pain Relief with a unique dual action. Goes on cool for immediate relief and then heats to soothe away the pain. Pain relief kicks in as little as 15 minutes and lasts 5-6 hours. It is recommended for the relief of muscle and joint pain, as well as in the event of injuries such as strains, bruises, dislocations and contusions.

  • Spray: Ideal when you want no-touch application and no rubbing required
  • Gel: Ideal when you prefer massage application and more controlled coverage

Formula Highlights:

  • Dual-action cooling then warming sensation
  • Quick absorption for convenient use
  • Powered by essential oils (as stated on product details)

Dual-Action Formula

Yes

Herbal essential oils

Yes

Mild, pleasant scent

Yes

Fast-absorbing, non-greasy

Yes

Pain relief and recovery

Yes

Use before and after sport

Yes

Important information

Safety Information:

In case of eye contact, rinse thoroughly with water. Do not use with bandages and do not cover. Do not use if pregnant, likely to become pregnant, while breast-feeding or in children under 6 years. Should any unwanted side effects occur, stop the use of the product. If symptoms continue, consult your pharmacist or medical doctor. This product contains methyl salicylate, application to the skin may increase sensitivity to sunlight. If you have sensitive skin test this product on a small area of skin before applying to a large area. If irritation develops, discontinue use. For external use only.

Directions:

Adults and children 6 years and above: Shake before use. Use a small amount of pressure to spray in a circle on the affected area. Spray from a minimum distance of 15cm.

product.desc:
Universal Design



This Japanese-made ceiling air conditioning vent cover is designed to fit a wide range of models, ensuring a universal fit for most air conditioners.






Easy Installation



The product is easy to install, making it a convenient solution for enhancing your air conditioning system's performance.






Waterproof Feature



The product features a waterproof design, preventing condensation and keeping your space dry and comfortable.






Dust Reduction



By blocking direct airflow, the vent cover helps reduce dust accumulation in your room, maintaining a cleaner environment.






Wind Direction Control



The adjustable wind direction control allows you to direct the airflow, providing a more personalized and efficient cooling experience.

page_json.category: Electronics Parts & Accessories > Home Appliances Parts & Accessories
page_json.description: <html> <head></head> <body>  Universal Design   This Japanese-made ceiling air conditioning vent cover is designed to fit a wide range of models, ensuring a universal fit for most air conditioners.    Easy Installation   The product is easy to install, making it a convenient solution for enhancing your air conditioning system's performance.    Waterproof Feature   The product features a waterproof design, preventing condensation and keeping your space dry and comfortable.    Dust Reduction   By blocking direct airflow, the vent cover helps reduce dust accumulation in your room, maintaining a cleaner environment.    Wind Direction Control   The adjustable wind direction control allows you to direct the airflow, providing a more personalized and efficient cooling experience.     </body></html>

3616563901.detail_text: Efficient Cooling Equipped with advanced cooling technology, this ice bag ensures your items stay cool and fresh for extended periods. Versatile Usage Ideal for outdoor activities such as camping, hiking, and picnics, this ice bag keeps your food and drinks chilled. Reusable Design Designed for repeated use, this ice bag is an eco-friendly choice that reduces waste and saves you money in the long run. Convenient Shape The rectangular shape of this ice bag makes it easy to store and transport, perfect for on-the-go adventures. Commercial Grade Durability Crafted for commercial use, this ice bag boasts superior durability, ensuring long-lasting performance for frequent use.

Convenient Shape

Commercial Grade Durability



Crafted for commercial use, this ice bag boasts superior durability, ensuring long-lasting performance for frequent use.

product.highlights:
• MINI BATTERY-OPERATED FAN: Cool off when youre at home, work or outdoors with Treva by O2COOL's 5-Inch Battery-Operated Portable Fan. Available in black, gray, light blue, and raspberry to complement everyones taste, this compact fan wont take up much space and features a convenient folding design for easy storage and transport. Its perfect for dorm rooms, hotel stays, cruise ship travel and summer camp!
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: To provide long-lasting strength and use, this personal fan is expertly crafted using durable plastic construction with a patented fan blade design which extends the battery life while maximizing airflow. The fan tilts and provides adjustable, directional personal airflow and cooling.
  • TWO-SPEED OPERATION: To accommodate your needs, the fan features high and low speeds. It fan boasts a quiet operation on both settings to keep you cool while making minimal noise so you can work, read or relax without any distractions.
  • EASY TO USE: The fan runs on two D batteries (not included). To install, slide out the battery door and insert batteries following (+/-) marks, then replace door. Slide switch located on the side of fan to your preferred setting. If fan does not operate, verify batteries are installed properly. The fan grill protects fingers from the blades during use.
  • EMERGENCY/DISASTER PREPAREDNESS: Make sure youre prepared the next time a power outage occurs due to a thunderstorm, hurricane, lightning or high winds. You can stay cool and comfortable even without electrical power with our reliable battery powered fans.
